meta.description: Hikmet, sukunet ve medrese geometrisi hissi tasiyan rafine Eden ERP sistem temasidir.
meta.author: EDEN Teknoloji

metadata.artDirection: Sukunet, hikmet, medrese geometrisi ve vakur ERP kullanimi.
metadata.inspiration: Medrese yildiz geometrisi, ince kemer cizgileri, zumrut yesili ve kontrollu altin vurgu.
metadata.notes: Hikmet runtime package is generated from the Eden ERP theme package generator.
metadata.designerNote: Change token values and asset references only. Keep layout, workflows and Eden logo unchanged.
